actions.description: Wrote design doc for unified game-over overlay. Shared drawGameOverOverlay() function spec with consistent colors (#e94560 title, #fff score, #888 secondary, #facc15 gold for new best), standardized layout, win-state variant (#4ade80). R&D coordination needed for per-game integration.

pivotStatus: impact assessment submitted (prior cycle), design work continues
nextStep: BUILD: Add shared drawGameOverOverlay() function to index.html, send R&D inbox for per-game integration
